title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 49
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a lost notebook.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you finally find your notebook? You looked everywhere before class this morning. || Man: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the science lab, because I remembered using it there yesterday. || Woman: And did you try the library? You said you went there afterwards. || Man: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my classmate sent me a message and said [1]I had left my notebook inside the computer room cupboard[/1]. I must have put it there without noticing. || Woman: What a relief. You will need it later. || Man: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you finally find your notebook? You looked everywhere before class this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the science lab, because I remembered using it there yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And did you try the library? You said you went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my classmate sent me a message and said I had left my notebook inside the computer room cupboard. I must have put it there without noticing.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What a relief. You will need it later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

items.question: Where is the notebook?
items.explanation: The speaker says they had left the notebook inside the computer room cupboard.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
items.audio_script: Boy: Are we still going to play mini golf after school? I was looking forward to it. || Girl: I don't think so. The course is flooded, so that plan will not work today. || Boy: We could hire bicycles instead. That might be fun. || Girl: I checked, but the shop has none left. My cousin had a different idea: [2]we are going to visit the craft fair this afternoon[/2]. || Boy: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Girl: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Are we still going to play mini golf after school? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The course is flooded, so that plan will not work today.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: We could hire bicycles instead. That might be fun.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I checked, but the shop has none left. My cousin had a different idea: we are going to visit the craft fair this afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

items.question: What are the friends going to do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they are going to visit the craft fair this afternoon.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the garden project.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the garden project tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use. || Man: Almost. I was going to bring a camera, but the teacher said we will not need that there. || Woman: What about sun cream? Do we need that? || Man: Not this time. The message says [3]everyone needs to bring gardening boots because the ground is very muddy today[/3]. || Woman: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now. || Man: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the garden project tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Almost. I was going to bring a camera, but the teacher said we will not need that there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about sun cream? Do we need that?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not this time. The message says everyone needs to bring gardening boots because the ground is very muddy today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

items.question: What should the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone needs to bring gardening boots because the ground is very muddy today.

items.context: You hear two people choosing food in a cafe.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us. || Girl: Not yet. I considered the pancake, but I would prefer something savoury. || Woman: What about the pasta salad? It looks good today. || Girl: I thought about that too, but it has olives in it. I think [4]I'll have the fish pie because it is today's special[/4]. || Woman: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay. || Girl: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Not yet. I considered the pancake, but I would prefer something savoury.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about the pasta salad? It looks good today.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I thought about that too, but it has olives in it. I think I'll have the fish pie because it is today's special.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

items.question: What food does the speaker choose?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses the fish pie because it is today's special.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the computer club.
items.audio_script: Man: Did you see the message about the computer club this afternoon? I was going straight to the computer room. || Boy: Do not go there, because new screens are being fitted. The teacher cannot use that room today. || Man: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the science lab. || Boy: That is wrong too, because a class is doing experiments there. The latest message says [5]we must meet in room nine after lunch[/5]. || Man: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place. || Boy: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you see the message about the computer club this afternoon? I was going straight to the computer room.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Do not go there, because new screens are being fitted. The teacher cannot use that room today.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the science lab.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That is wrong too, because a class is doing experiments there. The latest message says we must meet in room nine after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

items.question: Where should students go for the computer club?
items.explanation: The latest message says they must meet in room nine after lunch.

items.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the evening class.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the evening class tomorrow? I thought you were going to walk. || Man: I was, but it will be dark when I finish, so it is not a good idea now. || Woman: Could you take a taxi instead? It might be quicker. || Man: I checked, but it is too costly every week. [6]I'm taking the tram because it stops opposite the college[/6]. || Woman: That makes sense. When will you arrive? || Man: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How are you getting to the evening class tomorrow? I thought you were going to walk.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I was, but it will be dark when I finish, so it is not a good idea now.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Could you take a taxi instead? It might be quicker.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but it is too costly every week. I'm taking the tram because it stops opposite the college.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That makes sense. When will you arrive?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

items.question: How will the speaker get to the evening class?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses this way of travelling because it stops opposite the college.

items.context: You hear two people talking about work at the clothes shop.
items.audio_script: Girl: What are you doing at the clothes shop this afternoon? I thought you had to work at the till. || Boy: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning. || Girl: So are you going to arrange shoes instead? || Boy: No, because another assistant is doing that. The manager said [7]my job today is to put prices on new coats[/7]. || Girl: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five? || Boy: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: What are you doing at the clothes shop this afternoon? I thought you had to work at the till.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: So are you going to arrange shoes instead?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: No, because another assistant is doing that. The manager said my job today is to put prices on new coats.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

items.explanation: The speaker says their job today is to put prices on new coats.
